nodes.name: Start Profile Scraper
nodes.notes: Execute Once must be ON. Apify actor: apify~instagram-profile-scraper. Limited to 20 usernames — free tier memory limit (8192MB). Body must be JSON array of usernames, not comma-separated.

nodes.name: Wait 3 Minutes
nodes.notes: Profile scraper takes ~40 seconds for 20 profiles. 2 minutes is safe minimum.

nodes.name: Fetch Profile Results
nodes.notes: URL must be in expression mode (fx toggle) — not a literal string. Uses run ID from Start Profile Scraper.

nodes.name: Merge Profile Data
nodes.notes: Pulls biography and followersCount from profile scraper results. Falls back to post caption. Remove Duplicates must reference this node — not Filter & Format Leads.

nodes.name: Remove Duplicates
nodes.notes: References Merge Profile Data — not Filter & Format Leads. Using wrong source bypasses all merged bio data.

nodes.name: Append to Lead Sheet
nodes.notes: Mapping mode: Map Automatically (autoMapInputData). Do not use defineBelow — hardcoded schemas go stale when columns are added to the sheet after the workflow was built.

changelog: 2026-04-07: Added two-stage profile scrape — Start Profile Scraper, Wait 3 Minutes, Fetch Profile Results, Merge Profile Data inserted between Filter & Format Leads and Get Existing Leads
2026-04-07: Remove Duplicates updated to reference Merge Profile Data (not Filter & Format Leads)
2026-04-07: Append to Lead Sheet switched to Map Automatically — hardcoded schema was going stale
2026-04-07: Execute Once enabled on Get Existing Leads and Start Profile Scraper
2026-04-07: Profile scraper limited to 20 usernames — free tier 8192MB memory limit
